prestazioni: LS3 6.2L V8 (engine code: L99 for automatic, LS3 for manual) forced induction via Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger with 68mm inducer, 80mm exducer, and 58mm wastegate, supporting 12psi of boost for ~650whp on E85 fuel with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Texas Speed & Performance

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Tilton 7.25" twin-disc clutch (for manual) or a Sonnax upgraded 6L80E transmission with billet flexplate, upgraded torque converter (3,600 stall), and a PPE transmission cooler with integrated heat exchanger for automatic models

Custom Motec M150 ECU with individual cylinder fuel and ignition control, paired with a Bosch Motorsport 0280158881 1000cc high-impedance fuel injectors, Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump, and a Fore Innovations F2i-1000 fuel pressure regulator for consistent E85 delivery
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion kit (RB-CHEVY-IMPALA-SS) with extended carbon fiber fenders, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3-piece aluminum wheel setup: BBS LM-R 19x10.5 ET15 front and 19x12 ET25 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear)

Custom fabricated stainless steel exhaust system with Burns Stainless 3.5" merge collectors, dual 3.5" straight-pipe setup with X-pipe crossover, and custom 4.5" rolled tips by MagnaFlow, finished with a ceramic coating by Swain Tech for heat management

Full interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell) with custom Alcantara and Nappa leather upholstery by Katzkin, a custom bolt-in roll cage by Autopower Industries (4-point with harness bar), and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay with integrated AIM MXS Strada 7" digital dash and Motec PDM15 power distribution module
